---
title: "Schedule"
toc: false
date: ""
sidebar: false
format:
  html:
    number-sections: false
execute:
  freeze: false
---

:::{.contents-table .column-body-outset}

|Topic              |Instructor	| Links 												|
|-------------------|-----------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
|[05-Oct-2026 (Mon)]{.badge .badge-primary} ||												|
|[06-Oct-2026 (Tue)]{.badge .badge-primary} ||                                                                                  	|
|[07-Oct-2026 (Wed)]{.badge .badge-primary} ||                                                                                  	|
|[08-Oct-2026 (Thu)]{.badge .badge-primary} ||                                                                                  	|
|TFs                |Dania	|[Slides](presentations/TFs/TFslides.pdf), [Tutorial](tutorials/TFs/representingMotifs.html)    	|
|[09-Oct-2026 (Fri)]{.badge .badge-primary} ||                                                                                 	 	|

:::
